source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane Incident

event.top_event: Personnel basket struck crane boom cradle and personnel fell from basket
event.incident_type: Crane/Material-Handling Equipment Failure with Personnel Injury
actions_taken: Injured person removed from tank in stokes basket by platform personnel
First aid rendered to injured person
Medivac helicopter transported injured person to UTMB Hospital in Galveston Texas
Second injured person transported by boat to shore for evaluation
event.summary: On June 12, 2015 at 20:00 hours at platform HI A 537 B, during evacuation due to approaching tropical storm, a crane operator picked up a Billy Pugh personnel basket carrying four personnel. While swinging the basket over the helideck and lowering it toward a boat, the crane boom continued to swing northward despite the operator attempting to stop it with the swing brake. The crane was operating at 75 percent power instead of full throttle as designed. The operator raised the basket to place personnel back on deck, but the basket struck the crane boom cradle and became entangled. One person fell approximately 10-12 feet onto a Marine Portable Tank, landing on face and stomach and losing consciousness. A second person fell on the boom cradle sustaining minor injuries. Two remaining personnel stayed on basket and climbed down using boom cradle.
recommendations: Lake Jackson District had no recommendations to Regional Office at time of report
key_phrases: crane boom continued to swing North
basket struck the crane boom cradle and became entangled
Crane was designed to operate at full throttle

hazards.name: High wind conditions during personnel lift operations
Crane operation at reduced power setting

threats.name: Inadequate hydraulic pressure to overcome wind force
Boom swing not controlled by swing brake in gusty winds
Basket swung with wind instead of against wind
Basket entanglement with crane boom cradle

controls.name: Crane operation at manufacturer-specified full throttle
controls.barrier_role: Ensure adequate hydraulic pressure to control boom swing in wind
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to maintain crane hydraulic system capability

supporting_text: Crane was designed to operate at full throttle. At the time of the incident, the crane was operating at 3/4 throttle. This did not allow the crane enough hydraulic pressure to overcome the force generated by the wind.
Failed to operate the crane engine according to manufacturer's specifications.

controls.name: Swing brake to stop boom swing
controls.barrier_role: Stop uncontrolled boom swing in wind conditions
controls.lod_basis: Secondary control to arrest boom motion

supporting_text: the Crane Operator attempted to stop the swing of the boom with the swing brake. With gusty wind speeds and the crane engine at 75 percent power, the crane boom continued to swing North.

controls.name: Stop Work Authority (SWA) during high wind conditions
controls.barrier_role: Prevent personnel lifting operations in marginal or high wind conditions
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to prevent hazardous operations

supporting_text: Lessee failed to utilize Stop Work Authority (SWA) during high gusty winds of 25-30 mph which created a threat of personal injury while being lifted by personnel basket from the platform to the boat.

controls.name: Written procedures for personnel basket lift operations
controls.barrier_role: Establish safe work practices for crane personnel lifts
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to standardize safe operations

supporting_text: There were no written procedures in place for this specific task.
Did operator have procedures written? N
Did procedures cover the circumstances of this incident? N

controls.name: Pre-operation hazard identification
controls.barrier_role: Identify hazards prior to crane operations

supporting_text: There were no hazards identified prior to the crane operations.

controls.name: Boom swing direction control against wind
controls.barrier_role: Swing boom against wind to maintain control during personnel lift
controls.lod_basis: Operational procedure to maintain boom control

supporting_text: Crane Operator swung the boom and personnel basket with the wind instead of against the wind to make personnel lift down to the boat.

controls.name: Operational safety meeting prior to lift
controls.barrier_role: Brief personnel on hazards and procedures before lift operation

supporting_text: Did operator have an operational or safety meeting prior to job being performed? N

controls.name: Line of sight between operator and load
controls.barrier_role: Maintain visual contact to monitor basket and personnel during lift

supporting_text: While conducting the lift, was line of sight between operator and load maintained? N

controls.name: First aid and emergency response
controls.barrier_role: Provide immediate medical care and evacuation after personnel fall
controls.lod_basis: Recovery control to minimize injury severity

supporting_text: The Injured Person (IP) was removed from the tank in a stokes basket by platform personnel and rendered first aid until a Medivac helicopter arrived.
The IP was transported to UTMB Hospital in Galveston Texas for further evaluation and treatment.

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
